prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 13827→11972→11762→12092→6603，2021–2024 年基本在 11762–13827 区间波动，2025 年大幅前移至 6603，较 2024 年上升约 5489 名，显示该校在广东物理类报考热度出现显著跃升；本省物理类计划 2021 年 210 人、2022 年 220 人、2023 年 268 人、2024 年 314 人、2025 年 339 人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026 年计划 36 人，较 2025 年大幅缩减约 89%，缩招幅度极大，将显著推高竞争烈度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年第 19 名（近年稳定在 17–19 名），属全国顶尖师范类高校，综合实力强劲；2026 年声誉评价中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理类中性事件；抖音热度排名第 37（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平；历史投档异常方面，2022 年江西曾出现位次大幅下降（低关注），近年无显著断档记录；教育学 A+、心理学 A+、中国语言文学 A+、中国史 A+、地理学 A+、马克思主义理论 A+ 等 18 个学科获评 A- 及以上，学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工热门专业持续高热推荐，与北师大物理类招生专业（数学、 物理、化学、生物、心理、统计等）形成交叉热度；本省物理类考生 2026 年约 456,000 人，较 2025 年 440,208 人增加约 3.6%，竞争基数扩大；省控线近年平稳（436–445 分区间），未出现剧烈波动；北师大位于北京（非本省），在广东招生属跨省招生，无本地倾斜；2025 年广东招生约 105 人（含两校区），占全国总计划比例约 2–3%，属中等外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移的跃升趋势、2026 年计划骤降 89% 带来的稀缺性效应、本省物理类考生小幅增加，预计 2026 年竞争进一步加剧，位次将继续前移；但 2025 年 6603 名已属异常高位，缩招幅度过大可能引发部分考生转向同层次其他高校，形成一定回调压力。经综合权衡，预测最低位次约 3263 名，区间 2871–3655 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the Physics Category was approximately 13827→11972→11762→12092→6603. From 2021 to 2024, it fluctuated within the range of 11762–13827, but in 2025 it significantly advanced to 6603, an increase of about 5489 places compared to 2024, indicating a notable surge in popularity for this university among Guangdong Physics Category applicants. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 210 in 2021, 220 in 2022, 268 in 2023, 314 in 2024, and 339 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 36, a sharp reduction of about 89% compared to 2025, which will significantly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 19th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (stable at 17–19 in recent years), belonging to the top-tier normal universities in China with strong comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving neutral incidents related to university management. Douyin popularity ranking is 37th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a significant ranking drop in Jiangxi in 2022 (low attention), with no notable gaps in recent years. Disciplines such as Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Geography A+, and Marxist Theory A+ have 18 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular STEM majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, intersecting with BNU's Physics Category enrollment majors (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Psychology, Statistics, etc.). The number of provincial Physics Category candidates in 2026 is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, expanding the competition base. The provincial control line has been stable in recent years (436–445 points range), with no drastic fluctuations. BNU is located in Beijing (not in the province), so its enrollment in Guangdong is cross-provincial, with no local preference. In 2025, about 105 students were enrolled in Guangdong (including two campuses), accounting for about 2–3% of the total national plan, which is a moderate scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant upward trend in rankings in 2025, the scarcity effect caused by the 89% reduction in the 2026 plan, and the slight increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to advance. However, the 6603 ranking in 2025 is already abnormally high, and the excessive reduction in enrollment may lead some candidates to turn to other universities of the same level, creating some downward adjustment pressure. After comprehensive consideration, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3263, with a range of 2871–3655.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 3263, with a range of 2871–3655. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<2871) can focus on Tier 1 majors such as Psychology and Li Yun Experimental Class. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (>3655) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and cautiously attempt Tier 2.
